---
title: 'White evangelicals have rejected Jesus and chosen their false Messiah (Donald Trump)... woe to the church in the hose of USA!'
date: '2024-11-09T01:26:00.0070000+00:00'
draft: false
blogger_blog: 'NoHiding.Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4731731845221595767'
blogger_filename: '/2024/11/white-evangelicals-have-rejected-jesus.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/NoHiding.Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News Updates & Current Events'
---

<div><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjgxQeK9lCO2jLy64gC6Q7l7aDGh1XdGucpMieJtYr3iZSeCcDFqEvHWC486I-92D0HTZNNmyl7ETJUwZiCYBLJvnjII5jXMGZyXKWm_JQccOu7EInAxcj_gFBpMHTjtgyyRf8X10hRzCWkTbWN8tCMLMC3fXztkqwZ7NKvz12NHip0JLt6yCZ3jGYfpOIS" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="" data-original-height="567" data-original-width="713" height="318" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjgxQeK9lCO2jLy64gC6Q7l7aDGh1XdGucpMieJtYr3iZSeCcDFqEvHWC486I-92D0HTZNNmyl7ETJUwZiCYBLJvnjII5jXMGZyXKWm_JQccOu7EInAxcj_gFBpMHTjtgyyRf8X10hRzCWkTbWN8tCMLMC3fXztkqwZ7NKvz12NHip0JLt6yCZ3jGYfpOIS=w400-h318" width="400" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Judgment against the church is coming...&nbsp;</td></tr></tbody></table><br /><br /></div><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;">Woe to the church in the house of USA, woe to the house of white evangelicals, you are in danger of your candle being removed.</span><div><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"><br /></span></div><div><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;">You have rejected The Way of Yeshua, y</span><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;">ou have chosen Ahab, prepare accordingly.</span><br /><br /></div><div><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;">And he walked in the way of the kings of Israel as the house of Ahab had done, for the daughter of Ahab was his wife. And <b>he did evil in the sight of Yahweh</b> (2 Ch 21:6)</span><br /><br /><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;">You have wearied Yahweh with your words, but you ask, “With what have we wearied him?” You have done so when you say, “<b>Everyone who does evil is good in the sight of Yahweh, and in them he delights,</b>” or “Where is the God of justice?” (Mal 2:17)</span><br /><br /><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;">W. Hall Harris III et al., eds., The Lexham English Bible (Bellingham, WA: Lexham Press, 2012).</span><div><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"><br /></span></div><div><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjC74W_Lm1-dRGY2ncUCteBaICq2SBsdP6J3Kv9B9dvUMJ6xEQftVYTLGzxx0LJAr1FLqitrWBFEw4KUPm-GWwqRyLcerng-njkgxvJOxW1fGLnVnjU6hZdT_ru4tlCP50mcmGAQVquWf93X46YiKQ9hX7oEN3iAtzwHhBXMdOsCfiyR5qwrn0RydBzVVeH" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="" data-original-height="597" data-original-width="848" height="450" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjC74W_Lm1-dRGY2ncUCteBaICq2SBsdP6J3Kv9B9dvUMJ6xEQftVYTLGzxx0LJAr1FLqitrWBFEw4KUPm-GWwqRyLcerng-njkgxvJOxW1fGLnVnjU6hZdT_ru4tlCP50mcmGAQVquWf93X46YiKQ9hX7oEN3iAtzwHhBXMdOsCfiyR5qwrn0RydBzVVeH=w640-h450" width="640" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><br /></span></div><div><span style="white-space-collapse: preserve;"><br /></span><br /><br />

<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom&nbsp;<span face="sans-serif" style="background-color: white; color: #202122; font-size: 14px;">שָׁלוֹם</span>: Live Long and Prosper!</span>
<br />

<div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe</span>
</div>

Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant | Freelancer | Bible Nerd
<i>*Written withs some editing and research assistance from ChatGPT-4o</i>
<br /><br /><br />

</div></div>
